{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Overlord-level madra
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The spiritual space inside [[Mercy]]'s book contains [[Overlord-level madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
